seoTitle: Cloud Print Management Australia -- Tungsten Printix | Cloud Printing Australia
seoDescription: Eliminate print servers with Printix cloud print management. Secure release, central management, hybrid cloud printing for business, government, education and enterprise. Australian authorised reseller.

features.title: Serverless print infrastructure
features.description: Remove traditional print servers entirely. Printix manages everything from the cloud while print processing stays local on your network.

features.title: Secure print release
features.description: Hold documents until the user releases them at the device. Release via the Printix app, QR code, NFC, or ID badge through Printix Go.

features.title: Central web-based management
features.description: Configure and control printers, queues, drivers, and policies from a single cloud dashboard. Manage all sites from anywhere.

features.title: Cross-platform support
features.description: Print from Windows, Mac, Chromebook, iOS, and Android. Support every device in your organisation without complexity.

features.title: Driver and queue automation
features.description: Cloud driver store with automated queue and driver installation. Reduce helpdesk tickets and simplify onboarding.

features.title: Capture and workflows
features.description: Scan from MFDs or mobile devices directly to email, OneDrive, or SharePoint. OCR-enabled digitisation for searchable PDFs.

features.title: Hybrid cloud printing
features.description: Add cloud-managed home and remote printing to existing on-premise print systems. Bridge legacy infrastructure with modern cloud control.

features.title: Single sign-on integration
features.description: Authenticate with Microsoft Entra ID, Google Workspace, Okta, or OneLogin. Deploy via Microsoft Endpoint Manager.

features.title: Zero Trust security
features.description: Encrypted print jobs, centralised reporting, and audit trails. Print jobs stay on your local network. Compliance-ready.

pricing.volumeNote: Multi-year subscriptions (2 and 3-year terms) available with additional discounts. Education institutions receive free student access with a staff subscription. Non-profit discounts available. Contact us for a quote.

faq.question: What is cloud print management?
faq.answer: Cloud print management replaces traditional on-premise print servers with a cloud-managed platform. You manage printers, queues, drivers, and policies from a web dashboard while print processing stays local on your network. No print servers to maintain, patch, or back up.

faq.question: Do print jobs go through the cloud?
faq.answer: No. Print data stays on your local network. Printix manages configuration, policy, and reporting from the cloud, but print jobs are processed locally. Documents are encrypted and stored on the endpoint until released at the printer.

faq.question: What printers does Printix support?
faq.answer: Printix works with any printer that supports standard protocols (IPP, RAW 9100, or LPR). There is no need to invest in new certified printers or print connectors.

faq.question: How does secure print release work?
faq.answer: Documents are held until the user releases them at the device. Users can release via the Printix mobile app, QR code scanning, NFC tap, or ID badge using Printix Go embedded on supported MFDs from Brother, Canon, Epson, HP, Konica Minolta, Kyocera, Lexmark, Ricoh, and Xerox.

faq.question: Can I use Printix alongside Microsoft Universal Print?
faq.answer: Yes. Printix extends Universal Print capabilities with direct IP printing where jobs stay local, secure release workflows, and broader cross-platform support. Many organisations use Printix as the feature layer on top of Universal Print infrastructure.

faq.question: What about home and remote printing?
faq.answer: Printix supports home office and remote printing without VPN. Users can print securely from any location, and IT retains central management and reporting visibility.

faq.question: How long does setup take?
faq.answer: Printix is cloud-native with automatic updates. There is no complex installation or configuration required. Most organisations are operational within days, not weeks.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes. Printix offers a free 30-day trial with all features included. No credit card required.

faq.question: What does the education plan include?
faq.answer: Education institutions pay for staff and faculty users only. Student access is included free with an active staff subscription.

faq.question: How is billing calculated?
faq.answer: Billing is based on active users -- anyone who logged into the Printix service at least once during the billing cycle. You only pay for users who actually use the service.
